name: Tomatensalat (Tomato Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes and dice the onions.
2. Mix chopped tomatoes, diced onions, sugar, salt, basil, thyme, pepper in a bowl.
3. Whisk together vegetable oil, vinegar, and Worcestershire sauce in another bowl.
4. Pour the dressing over the tomato mixture and stir gently until combined.
5. Cover and chill for 1 hour before serving.
6. Serve on lettuce leaves.
